      "author": "NorthbridgeLibrarian",
      "text": "Happy to announce that the Northbridge Central Library will be hosting its annual 'Storytelling Under Stars' event this Saturday from 6pm! We'll have local authors reading, a children's corner, and free tea. Please note the main entrance is being used for deliveries until 5:30pm, so use the side gate or the app map for directions. Come along and support our local writers! 📚✨ #Northbridge #CommunityEvents",
